metadata.config:
rope:
  length_m: 1.0
  n_segments: 32
  bend_stiffness: 1.0
  twist_stiffness: 1.0
  friction: 1.0
  radius: 0.005
sim:
  dt: 0.001
  substeps: 5
  rod_damping: 10.0
  rod_angular_damping: 5.0
  initial_settle_steps: 0
  reset_settle_max_steps: 5000
  move_step_size: 0.03
  move_hold_steps: 0
  grasp_realism: true
collection:
  n_envs: auto
  n_env_candidates: [16, 32, 64]
  K: 4
  target_count: 5000
  max_records: 5300
  init_shapes: [straight, u_bend, s_curve, random_smooth]
  p_low: 1
  p_high_margin: 1
  delta_min_m: 0.02
  delta_max_m: 0.15
  lift_choices: [low, high]
  vel_threshold: 0.001
  settle_max_steps: 5000
  progress_every_rounds: 1
probe:
  enabled: true
  rounds: 2
outputs:
  h5: outputs/data/p0_random_transitions.h5
  dm_stats_json: outputs/metrics/dm_stats.json
  dm_normalizer_json: outputs/metrics/dm_normalizer.json
  dm_hist_png: outputs/plots/dm_hist_all_channels.png
  dm_norm_hist_png: outputs/plots/dm_hist_norms.png
  stdout_log: outputs/reports/collect_random_stdout.log

recovery_records.error: FloatingPointError: DLO-Lab rod vertices contain non-finite values
ValueError: cannot convert float NaN to integer
FloatingPointError: DLO-Lab rod vertices contain non-finite values
FloatingPointError: DLO-Lab rod vertices contain non-finite values

physics_quality_note: For gate/human review, prefer rates.success_and_converged (0.484) over the headline settle_converged rate: failed grasps are no-op transitions whose converged flag reflects the untouched rope, so the aggregate conflates populations. Settle non-convergence at the immutable 1e-3/5000 budget affects 2341 successful transitions; they are recorded honestly (settle_steps == max_steps) and excluded from the normalizer fit. Flagged for the M5/M6 human gates (plan A1).
